headline: BD Surgiphor Clearance Puts Surgical Consumables And Valuation In Focus
summary: Becton Dickinson (NYSE:BDX) has received FDA 510(k) clearance for its Surgiphor 1000mL antimicrobial irrigation system. The product is the first system of its kind specifically designed for powered lavage in surgical settings. The clearance expands BD's surgical solutions offering and is intended to support safety, efficacy, and efficiency in operating rooms. Becton Dickinson, trading at $176.54, is adding Surgiphor 1000mL to its surgical solutions lineup at a time when the shares have seen...
